title: Game3D Asset Manifest
description: Per-screen asset bundle declaration for the R3F game module. Downstream agents (world-grid-author, location-builder) may add fields — additionalProperties is allowed at all levels.

screen_id.description: Unique identifier for the screen/location that owns this manifest (e.g. 'neighborhood-2-1').

models.description: GLTF/GLB model assets to preload for this screen.

id.description: Stable key used to reference this model in code (e.g. 'garage').

path.description: Absolute path from the public root (e.g. '/game3d-assets/models/garage.glb').

textures.description: KTX2 or other texture assets. Reserved for future use — useKTX2 support lands next cycle.

audio.description: Audio asset references (not loaded by this pipeline — handed off to AudioManager).

preload.description: Arbitrary extra asset paths to begin fetching early (e.g. next-screen models). No lifecycle management — fire and forget.
